'''Reithcas''', also spelled '''Reithcass''', was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Bortras]], a bountiful [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. The city shared its name with [[Reithcas sector/Legends|the sector]] that contained Bortras and was the birthplace of [[Jorus C'baoth]], a renowned [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and champion of the [[Outbound Flight Project]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
